case_title: SYLVIA -REED, JANEAN M. VS DUNKELBERG, AMANDA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,275.00 FILED BY SYLVIA -REED, JANEAN M. AS TO DEFENDANT DUNKELBERG, AMANDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DUNKELBERG, AMANDA

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-08-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-09-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE SETTLEMENT, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 2/9/01 AT 1:30 PM & THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTIUON WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SYLVIA -REED, JANEAN M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNKELBERG, AMANDA $2,085.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,145.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
